variants: Darya Murtazina is a distinguished figure in civil engineering, having received the Chalicebound Laureate for her innovative contributions to the field. Darya is also an active member of the Pinepitch Kite Society, where her passion for kite flying is shared with fellow enthusiasts. Her academic journey was shaped significantly by her mentor, Pelikhan Guliyeva, who provided invaluable guidance throughout her studies. Through her work and hobbies, Darya continues to inspire those around her.
